requirement_topic.en: APUA Grid Connection — IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 Evidence and 230/400 V, 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: APUA并网——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据及230/400 V、50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: APUA併網——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據及230/400 V、50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-tied solar PV inverter deployment in Antigua and Barbuda is a project-level utility connection question with Antigua Public Utilities Authority (APUA), within the standards context of the Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS). Practical submissions should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, site protection settings, commissioning records, and project-specific APUA connection conditions. Antigua and Barbuda's low-voltage grid should be treated as 230/400 V at 50 Hz. The 50 Hz frequency aligns with China, but the voltage does not: China nominal is 220/380 V.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达并网太阳能光伏逆变器部署属于安提瓜公共事业局（APUA）的项目级公用事业接入事项，并处于安提瓜和巴布达标准局（ABBS）的标准背景下。实际提交文件应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公共电网接口证据、场址保护整定、调试记录以及APUA项目特定接入条件。安提瓜和巴布达低压电网应按230/400 V、50 Hz处理。50 Hz频率与中国一致，但电压不同：中国标称为220/380 V。
summary.zht: 安地卡及巴布達併網太陽能光伏逆變器部署屬於安地卡公共事業局（APUA）的項目級公用事業接入事項，並處於安地卡及巴布達標準局（ABBS）的標準背景下。實際提交文件應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、場址保護整定、調試記錄以及APUA項目特定接入條件。安地卡及巴布達低壓電網應按230/400 V、50 Hz處理。50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但電壓不同：中國標稱為220/380 V。

standards_or_laws: APUA project-specific grid-connection and commissioning conditions for distributed or utility solar PV installations
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Antigua and Barbuda low-voltage grid design basis: 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power-station connection to power systems, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 37408-2021 for grid-connected inverter requirements. These documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and are not automatic evidence for APUA acceptance. China's nominal low-voltage grid is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so only the frequency aligns with Antigua and Barbuda; the voltage differs and inverter firmware profiles, voltage trip thresholds, reconnection timing, and power-quality behavior should be revalidated for 230/400 V.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范以及GB/T 37408-2021并网逆变器要求。上述文件基于中国电网条件，不能自动作为APUA接受证据。中国标称低压电网为220/380 V、50 Hz，因此只有频率与安提瓜和巴布达一致；电压不同，逆变器固件配置、电压脱扣阈值、重连时间和电能质量表现应针对230/400 V重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範以及GB/T 37408-2021併網逆變器要求。上述文件基於中國電網條件，不能自動作為APUA接受證據。中國標稱低壓電網為220/380 V、50 Hz，因此只有頻率與安地卡及巴布達一致；電壓不同，逆變器韌體配置、電壓脫扣閾值、重連時間和電能品質表現應針對230/400 V重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection documents do not substitute for APUA project connection acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 reports for the exact inverter model or family, document the Antigua and Barbuda country firmware profile, validate operation at 230/400 V and 50 Hz, and obtain APUA project-specific connection and commissioning acceptance. Do not state that Antigua and Barbuda voltage matches China; only the 50 Hz frequency aligns.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不能替代APUA项目接入接受。出口商应准备特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62116和IEC 61727报告，记录安提瓜和巴布达国家固件配置，验证230/400 V和50 Hz运行，并取得APUA项目特定接入和调试接受。不得声称安提瓜和巴布达电压与中国匹配；仅50 Hz频率一致。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不能替代APUA項目接入接受。出口商應準備特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62116和IEC 61727報告，記錄安地卡及巴布達國家韌體配置，驗證230/400 V和50 Hz運行，並取得APUA項目特定接入和調試接受。不得聲稱安地卡及巴布達電壓與中國匹配；僅50 Hz頻率一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level where APUA requires grid-connection review, utility acceptance, or commissioning before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid or certification expectations only; it is not transferable to APUA Antigua and Barbuda acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat APUA grid connection as a separate project approval gate. Submit IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, validate firmware for 230/400 V at 50 Hz, and document commissioning settings for the actual Antigua and Barbuda site. Chinese 220/380 V GB/T settings are not a voltage match and are not automatically accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将APUA并网视为独立项目审批门槛。提交IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，针对230/400 V、50 Hz验证固件，并记录安提瓜和巴布达实际场址的调试设置。中国220/380 V GB/T参数并非电压匹配，也不会被自动接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將APUA併網視為獨立項目審批門檻。提交IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，針對230/400 V、50 Hz驗證韌體，並記錄安地卡及巴布達實際場址的調試設置。中國220/380 V GB/T參數並非電壓匹配，也不會被自動接受。
